items.name_en: Premium quality, B's latest B-shaped buckle bucket bag
items.name_cn:
Premium quality, B's latest B-shaped buckle bucket bag
Crafted from calfskin. Made in an Italian workshop, named after the B-shaped buckle accessory engraved with the brand logo. Paired with a cotton blend lining and an adjustable mesh shoulder strap. Adorned with fine Burberry check, interpreted in a signature sand color. The compact and versatile shape allows you to switch between handbag, shoulder, or crossbody styles.
Size 21x8.5x22cm

specs.rawTitle:

Size 21x8.5x22cm

items.name_en: Premium quality, B's latest Horseshoe backpack, inspired by British pastoral elegance. Crafted from quilted nylon fabric with fine-woven Burberry check, presented in the brand's signature sand color. Adorned with leather accents and a knight's seal design, a vintage pattern from 1980s brand bags. Features a D-ring on the side for hanging charms, creating a personalized look.
items.name_cn:
Premium quality, B's latest Horseshoe backpack, inspired by British pastoral elegance. Crafted from quilted nylon fabric with fine-woven Burberry check, presented in the brand's signature sand color. Adorned with leather accents and a knight's seal design, a vintage pattern from 1980s brand bags. Features a D-ring on the side for hanging charms, creating a personalized look.
- Front features a horseback riding knight logo (EKD) cowhide plaque
Dimensions 17.20.14.

items.name_en: Premium quality, B's latest soft structured shoulder bag, crafted from cotton twill fabric. Made in an Italian workshop, decorated with fine B's exclusive check. From the Burberry Classic Collection, interpreting a wardrobe essential with a bold brand style. Size 36x18.5×58

items.name_en: Premium quality, high version
items.name_cn:
Premium quality, high version
Dior❤️ Toujours Handbag [Black Medium]
This Dior Toujours handbag made its debut at the Fall/Winter 2023 show, featuring a unique, casual, and practical design. Crafted from black calfskin, it features oversized woven quilting stitching. The spacious interior compartment includes a small pocket for neatly organizing daily essentials. It features a CD Lock letter D turn-knob closure and adjustable sides to enhance its elegance. The leather handle has adjustable details for easy hand-carry.
 CD Lock and strap closure
 Dior charm
 Removable inner pocket
 Adjustable leather handle
 Includes dust bag
Model: 2821
Dimensions: 28.5x19x21.5cm

specs.rawTitle:

items.name_en: Premium quality, high version
items.name_cn:
Premium quality, high version
This miniature Toujours vertical handbag is a new arrival from the 2025 Fall/Winter collection, stylish and practical. Crafted from pink calfskin, it features oversized woven quilting stitching and a spacious interior compartment for various daily essentials. It features a slim leather strap closure for secure storage, along with a light gold-finished metal CD Lock letter D turn-knob clasp. The adjustable sides enhance its elegance. The top leather handle is paired with a detachable leather shoulder strap, allowing for hand-carry, shoulder, or crossbody wear.
Model 2834
Dimensions 13×15×12cm

items.name_en: Premium quality, mini B-clasp messenger bag. Crafted from calfskin in an Italian atelier. Features an unlined design with a soft, structured shape. Named for the B-clasp on the front pocket, which bears the brand's logo. Equipped with an adjustable mesh shoulder strap decorated with fine knit Burberry check, and a discreet Equestrian Knight Emblem (EKD) embossed on the rear panel. The outer pocket features a B-clasp closure; includes an inner slip pocket. Dimensions 19 x 9 x 17.5cm

items.name_en: Premium quality, mini Gotswolds check tote bag. Handcrafted in an Italian atelier from grained calfskin, featuring Burberry check side panels and a matching signature sand-colored lining. Exquisitely designed with ample interior space. Incorporates check embossed closure and buckle hardware, inspired by the brand's iconic trench coat belt. Can be carried by hand or with the adjustable shoulder strap for a shoulder carry. Dimensions 24.5 x 13 x 19cm

items.name_en: Premium Reproduction Fendi
items.name_cn:
Premium Reproduction Fendi
💗FEND1 iconic Peekaboo ISeeU handbag, petite and cute. White with layered Nappa soft leather, accented with classic turn-lock on both sides. Lined interior with two compartments separated by hard partitions, featuring a pocket and gold hardware. Includes handle and adjustable detachable shoulder strap, for hand or crossbody carry. Made in Italy.
Dimensions 11-20-15
Style 8336

items.name_en: Premium top-grain leather M23951 Light green with white Medium. This Capucines Medium handbag features a beautiful Lovelock braided chain. It connects hand-painted Monogram elements and the LV monogram lock with chain links. Contrasting leather forms the iconic LV logo, exuding an elegant air. Dimensions: 31.5 × 20 × 11 cm
